expected_behavior: A medium-length conversational episode (~50 min) with no creator-supplied chapters. Pre-au2v.1 (mode=.off): no chapter signal, the pipeline relies on transcript+feature coverage alone, and any in-episode ad pocket masked by conversational filler is missed. Post-au2v.1 (mode=.enabled): the chapter generation phase runs, emits one ChapterPlan with ~5 inferred boundary segments, and downstream consumers gain the structural prior they previously lacked.
synthesis_notes: Modeled on the structural shape of a typical long-form interview show row from the dogfood diagnostics corpus (atom density ~0.5 atoms/sec, duration ~3000 s, no id3/pc20/rssInline chapters present). All identifiers are synthetic; transcript text is OMITTED entirely from the fixture (atoms carry empty text). No commercial-message names, episode title, or podcast title is captured.
